🇮🇷 به HORNET VPN خوش آمدید! لطفاً زبان خود را انتخاب کنید.
🇬🇧 Welcome to HORNET VPN! Please choose your language.
🇷🇺 Добро пожаловать в HORNET VPN! Пожалуйста, выберите язык.

free_trial_failed: ❌ Activating the free trial failed. Please contact support.
connection_guide_message:
📖 *Connection Guide*

*📱 Android (v2rayNG)*
1. Install v2rayNG from Google Play or GitHub.
2. Copy your subscription link (from "Get Configuration").
3. In v2rayNG tap the "+" icon at the top and choose "Import config from Clipboard".
4. Tap the added server, then tap the connect (V) button at the bottom.

*🍏 iPhone / iOS (Streisand or FoXray)*
1. Install Streisand or FoXray from the App Store.
2. Copy your subscription link.
3. In the app choose "Add Subscription" or "Import from Clipboard" and paste the link.
4. Select the server and tap connect.

*💻 Windows/Mac (Clash / Clash Meta)*
1. Install Clash Verge or Clash for Windows.
2. Paste the subscription link (Clash format) under "Profiles → Import from URL".
3. Activate the profile and connect.

If you run into issues, contact support.
faq_message:
❓ *Frequently Asked Questions*

*1. How do I buy a subscription?*
Use the "Buy / Renew" menu and pick a plan.

*2. What payment methods are supported?*
Card-to-card transfer (auto-verified on exact amount match) and the internal wallet.

*3. How do I top up my wallet?*
Go to the "Wallet" menu, choose top-up, and transfer the amount shown.

*4. What about the free trial?*
Each user can claim the free trial plan only once.

*5. What if I can't connect?*
Check the "Connection Guide" menu or contact support.
help_message:
📖 *Full Bot Guide*

Everything is available from the bottom keyboard menu:

🛒 *Buy Service* — pick a plan and pay (card-to-card or wallet). After confirmation your config is sent automatically.

🎁 *Free Trial* — once per user, to test the service.

📋 *My Services* — view each subscription: remaining time & data, subscription link, get config, and "Change Config" (new link).

💰 *Wallet* — top up your balance for faster purchases without transferring each time.

👤 *My Account* — balance, referral code, and your rank.

📖 *Connection Guide* — step-by-step setup for Android, iOS and Windows.

🆘 *Support* — reach us for any issue.

*Commands:*
/start or /menu — back to the main menu
/restart — exit any step and start over
/help — this guide
/language — change language

config_instructions_v2rayng:
📱 *V2RayNG*
1. Copy the link above.
2. In v2rayNG tap "+" and choose "Import config from Clipboard".

📦 *Sing-Box*
1. Copy the link above.
2. In the Sing-Box app, choose "Add profile from URL" and paste the link.
3. Enable the profile and connect.
config_instructions_clash:
⚡ *Clash*
1. Copy the link above.
2. In Clash, go to "Profiles → Import from URL" and paste the link.
3. Activate the profile and connect.
config_instructions_clashmeta:
🔄 *Clash Meta*
1. Copy the link above.
2. In Clash Meta, go to "Profiles → Import from URL" and paste the link.
3. Activate the profile and connect.

connection_guide_intro:
📖 Connection Guide

Please choose your device platform:
guide_android_body:
🤖 *Android connection guide*

📥 *1) Install an app:*
• v2rayNG: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayNG/releases/latest
• Hiddify: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=app.hiddify.com

🔗 *2) Copy the subscription link*
Copy it from “My Subscriptions” (tap the link to copy).

➕ *3) Add to the app*
v2rayNG: tap + → “Import config from Clipboard”.
Hiddify: tap + → “Add from clipboard”.

🔄 *4) Update*
Open the subscription and tap “Update subscription”.

✅ *5) Connect*
Pick a server and tap connect.
guide_ios_body:
🍎 *iOS connection guide*

📥 *1) Install an app:*
• Shadowrocket (paid): https://apps.apple.com/app/shadowrocket/id932747118
• Stash: https://apps.apple.com/app/stash/id1596063349

🔗 *2) Copy the subscription link*
Copy it from “My Subscriptions”.

➕ *3) Add subscription*
Shadowrocket: tap + → type Subscription → paste the link.

🟢 *4) Enable the profile*
Select the subscription and turn the VPN on.

✅ *5) Connect*
Allow adding the VPN profile on first use.
guide_windows_body:
🪟 *Windows connection guide*

📥 *1) Install an app:*
• Hiddify Next: https://github.com/hiddify/hiddify-next/releases/latest
• v2rayN: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN/releases/latest

🔗 *2) Copy the subscription link*

➕ *3) Import the link*
v2rayN: Servers → “Import bulk URL from clipboard”.
Hiddify: “New Profile” → “Add from clipboard”.

🔄 *4) Update & select a node*

✅ *5) Connect*
